badge-builder.title: Interactive badge constructor
badge-builder.description: Assemble `GrBadge` for your scenario: switch `tone`, `size`, `radius`, filled-mode and the label text and see the resulting snippet instantly.

badge-tone-scale.title: Light and dark semantic tones
badge-tone-scale.description: Works as a reference for the semantic palette: light and filled (`dark`) modes are easy to compare side by side, including `slate` and `azure`.

badge-size-radius.title: Size and radius combinations
badge-size-radius.description: Isolates `size` and `radius` to quickly show pill/semi/square badges for table cells, filters and inline labels.

badge-toolbar-filters.title: Badges inside action toolbars
badge-toolbar-filters.description: The component is often used not on its own but as a secondary marker inside toolbar/filter buttons. This scenario shows the composition pattern.

builder.label: Label
builder.summaryDark: A filled (`dark`) badge works better as a bright status indicator inside tables, toolbar counters and alert summaries.
builder.summarySquare: A square badge gives the densest silhouette and suits compact row-level labels and counters.
builder.summarySemi: The semi radius is visually closer to a filter chip and is handy where you need a slightly stricter outline without a full pill effect.
builder.summaryNeutral: A neutral light badge is a safe default for metadata, secondary statuses and supporting captions.
builder.summaryDefault: Assemble the right combination of `tone`, `size`, `radius` and `dark` to quickly check the badge before using it in the interface.
